data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Makeup sessions for missed classes', but the evidence does not include any specific API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. While the linked use case mentions that Sarah can make up a missed session in a designated makeup cohort, there is no concrete evidence provided to demonstrate how this is implemented or tracked within the system. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage as the necessary validation checks were not performed.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or persisted state checks confirming the implementation of makeup sessions for missed classes.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
